nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (Every 15 min)
nodes.notes: Runs every 15 minutes. Adjust interval as needed.

nodes.name: Gmail: Fetch Unread Emails
nodes.notes: Fetches up to 50 unread emails not yet ranked or processed.

nodes.name: Filter: Has Emails?
nodes.notes: Stops processing if no emails were fetched.

nodes.name: Code: Rank & Classify Email
nodes.notes:
Scores email 1–5. Edit keyword lists inside to customise detection rules.
1=Spam, 2=Newsletter, 3=Normal, 4=Work, 5=High Priority

nodes.name: Router: Is Spam?
nodes.notes: Splits flow — spam emails go to deletion, others go to labelling.

nodes.name: Gmail: Delete Spam
nodes.notes: Permanently deletes emails ranked as SPAM. Connect to 'true' output of the spam router.

nodes.name: Code: Log Deletion
nodes.notes: Builds a structured log entry for every deleted email. Connect downstream to a Google Sheet, Notion DB, or webhook if you want an audit log.

nodes.name: Gmail: Apply Rank Label
nodes.notes:
Applies the rank label (e.g. RANK-3-NORMAL) to the email. You must create these labels in Gmail first:
RANK-1-SPAM, RANK-2-NEWSLETTER, RANK-3-NORMAL, RANK-4-WORK, RANK-5-HIGH-PRIORITY

nodes.name: Gmail: Mark as Ranked
nodes.notes: Adds a 'ranked' label so this email is skipped in future runs. Create a 'ranked' label in Gmail.

nodes.name: Code: Post-Processing Hook
nodes.notes:
EXTENSIBILITY POINT — Wire additional nodes after this one:
• Slack notification for Rank 5
• Google Sheets logging
• Todoist/Notion task creation
• Auto-reply or forwarding

nodes.name: Filter: High Priority Only (Rank 5)
nodes.notes:
OPTIONAL — Example extension node. Only passes through Rank-5 emails.
Wire a Slack, email, or push notification node after this.

nodes.name: TODO: Notify High Priority
nodes.notes: REPLACE THIS NODE with a Slack / email / push notification action for Rank-5 emails.
